case_title: BERNABE BEN CANDELARIO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-16-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF BERNABE CANDELARIO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANDELARIO, BERNABE BEN HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANDELARIO, BERNABE BEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-02-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2008
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANDELARIO, BERNABE BEN
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF CANDELARIO, BERNABE BEN
ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE TO MARCH 31, 2008; EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
